name: q-shield
description: Q-Shield Parametric Insurance Platform - Guidewire DEVTrails 2026

scripts.dev: concurrently --names "BACKEND,FRONTEND,AI_ENGINE" --prefix-colors "blue,green,magenta" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "cd backend/ai_engine && python -m uvicorn app:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000"
scripts.start: concurrently --names "BACKEND,FRONTEND,AI_ENGINE" --prefix-colors "blue,green,magenta" "npm start --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "cd backend/ai_engine && python -m uvicorn app:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix frontend && mkdir -p dist && cp -rv frontend/dist/* dist/
scripts.setup: npm install && npm run install:all && echo. && echo 🚀 [Setup] Remember to run backend/schema.sql in your Postgres DB!
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && pip install -r backend/ai_engine/requirements.txt
